holdings.infoBox: IPKW is an equity ETF with a total of 179 individual holdings. The top holdings are UniCredit stock at 5.81%, ING Groep at 5.70%, Prosus at 4.84%, Standard Chartered at 4.82%, and TotalEnergies SE at 4.54%.

overview.description: The Invesco International BuyBack Achievers ETF (IPKW) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a modified market-cap-weighted index of global ex-US companies that have reduced their outstanding shares by at least 5% in the past year. IPKW was launched on Mar 6, 2014 and is issued by Invesco.
